title: galium × neglectum var. genuinum
intro: Galium × neglectum var. genuinum is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, specifically a variant of Galium neglectum. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which have been utilized in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Galium × neglectum var. genuinum include its ability to reduce pain and swelling, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and skin issues. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and infusing its leaves to create teas, tinctures, or topical creams that can be applied to affected areas.
